Ad astra abyssoque! Welcome to the Adventurers' Guild!

The Adventurers' Guild will issue different [Bounties] based on the [Bounty Board]! [Bounties] will increase over time, so please be patient! The bounties issued by different Adventurers' Guilds will also vary. After completing the task, give me the Bounty, and I will reward you based on the task!
